backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing CRUD operations for CreativeProject records with fields for title, description, timestamps, images, and creator principal, including authorization checks and sorting by title then completion timestamp.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implementation of image upload, dashboard view, project form, detail view, and professional visual theme with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose and functionality, including pages, components, hooks, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes with earth-tone palette, plus global border and background utilities.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Creative Tracker application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining routes for dashboard, create, detail, and edit pages, all wrapped in Layout component with type-safe router declaration.
frontend/src/components/ImageUpload.tsx: Multi-image upload component with preview, progress tracking, and removal functionality using ExternalBlob from blob-storage with file input and card-based display.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Application layout wrapper with sticky header containing branding, navigation, Internet Identity login/logout controls, main content outlet, and footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/ProjectCard.tsx: Displays a clickable card for a creative project with thumbnail image, title, description, completion date, and Amazon upload status. Navigates to project detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/ProjectForm.tsx: Form component for creating/editing projects with fields for title, description, completion date, Amazon upload date, and images. Includes validation and handles submission with loading states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality using DFINITY AuthClient. Manages identity state and authentication status throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom React Query hooks for CRUD operations on creative projects including getAllProjects, getProject, createProject, updateProject, and deleteProject with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles with Tailwind CSS setup, custom CSS variables for light/dark theme color palettes using sophisticated earth tones, and font configuration for Playfair Display and Inter.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function that combines clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreateProjectPage.tsx: Page component for creating new projects with ProjectForm, handles submission via useCreateProject mutation, and shows toast notifications on success/error.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page that displays all projects in a grid layout, shows empty state for new users, and requires authentication to view content.
frontend/src/pages/EditProjectPage.tsx: Page component for editing existing projects that loads project data, renders a ProjectForm with initial values, and handles update submission with navigation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectDetailPage.tsx: Page component displaying full project details with formatted dates, image gallery, and actions for editing and deleting projects with confirmation dialog.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, typography with Inter and Playfair Display fonts, extended border radius, shadows, and animations for UI components.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking an Amazon marketing agency creative management system with features for tracking completion/upload dates, image handling, and professional UI design requirements.
